mapper.insert: insert into orders (id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, receiver_address, total_amount, real_pay_amount, post_amount, pay_method, left_msg, extand, is_comment, is_delete, created_time, updated_time ) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{realPayAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{postAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{leftMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{extand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isComment,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: update orders set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receiver_name = #{receiverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receiver_mobile = #{receiverMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, receiver_address = #{receiverAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total_amount = #{totalAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, real_pay_amount = #{realPayAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, post_amount = #{postAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pay_method = #{payMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER}, left_msg = #{leftMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, extand = #{extand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_comment = #{isComment,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, receiver_address, total_amount, real_pay_amount, post_amount, pay_method, left_msg, extand, is_comment, is_delete, created_time, updated_time from orders where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, receiver_address, total_amount, real_pay_amount, post_amount, pay_method, left_msg, extand, is_comment, is_delete, created_time, updated_time from orders
